/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin24-g++-14 -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/program.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/vertex_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/src/texture.cpp.o -o camera   -L/Users/SH/Desktop/Computer_Graphics/OpenGL/camera/build/install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/SH/Desktop/Computer_Graphics/OpenGL/camera/build/install/lib -lspdlog -lglfw3 -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreVideo
